title: Stock Market Today, Mar. 4: U.S. and European stocks rise despite Asia market meltdown
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: On March 4, 2026, U.S. and European stocks rose while Asian markets experienced significant declines due to geopolitical tensions. Nasdaq and Russell 2000 saw g
excerpt: On March 4, 2026, U.S. and European stocks rose while Asian markets experienced significant declines due to geopolitical tensions. Nasdaq and Russell 2000 saw gains. Crypto-linked stocks surged amid easing oil prices.

content.introduction: On March 4, 2026, U.S. and European stocks rose while Asian markets experienced significant declines due to geopolitical tensions. Nasdaq and Russell 2000 saw gains. Crypto-linked stocks surged amid easing oil prices.
